title: Beehiiv vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Beehiiv vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Beehiiv and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on newsletter publishers and media operators
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv wins for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Mailgun?
faq.a: Mailgun starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
